name: CONTRACT-BUG-34
title: check-imports-resolve.py regex 'claude_path_pattern' matches paths under .claude/features only
description: scripts/enforcement/check-imports-resolve.py line 58 regex r'.claude/features/[a-z][a-z0-9-]+(?:/[^\s)\]\']?)?' matches paths starting with .claude/features. It does NOT check references to .claude/hooks/, .claude/skills/, .claude/commands/, or .claude/agents/. Bug fixes that move scripts there could leave dangling docs references undetected. Widen the regex to cover the full .claude/ subtree.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 2: schema permissiveness, template fields, enforcement script corrections per Inv 22-33.
